allow: PowerShell($cats = @\("technical","supply_chain","grid_energy","regulatory","financial","construction","operational","environmental"\); foreach \($c in $cats\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "d:\\IA\\ĺ·Ąĺ…·\\Hydrogen_Projet_Copilot\\knowledge_base\\risk_library\\$c" | Out-Null }; Write-Output "Created 8 risk category directories")

PowerShell($cats = @\("electrolyzer_system","electrical_infrastructure","water_systems","hydrogen_processing","civil_construction","thermal_management","instrumentation_controls","indirect_owners_costs"\); foreach \($c in $cats\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "d:\\IA\\ĺ·Ąĺ…·\\Hydrogen_Projet_Copilot\\knowledge_base\\cost_library\\$c" | Out-Null }; Write-Output "8 cost library directories ready")

PowerShell($f = "d:\\IA\\ĺ·Ąĺ…·\\Hydrogen_Projet_Copilot\\README.md"; $lines = \(Get-Content $f | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; $sizeKB = [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $f\).Length/1024,1\); Write-Output "README.md: ${lines} lines, ${sizeKB} KB"; $sections = Select-String -Path $f -Pattern "^## " | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.LineNumber\): $\($_.Line.Trim\(\)\)" }; Write-Output "Sections:"; $sections)

PowerShell($v1 = "d:\\IA\\ĺ·Ąĺ…·\\Hydrogen_Projet_Copilot\\README.md"; $v2 = "d:\\IA\\ĺ·Ąĺ…·\\Hydrogen_Projet_Copilot\\README_v2.md"; $l1 = \(Get-Content $v1 | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; $l2 = \(Get-Content $v2 | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; $s1 = [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $v1\).Length/1024,1\); $s2 = [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $v2\).Length/1024,1\); Write-Output "README.md: $l1 lines, $s1 KB"; Write-Output "README_v2.md: $l2 lines, $s2 KB"; Write-Output "Delta: +$\($l2-$l1\) lines, +$\($s2-$s1\) KB"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "Sections in v2:"; Select-String -Path $v2 -Pattern "^## " | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.Line.Trim\(\)\)" })

PowerShell(Select-String -Path "d:\\IA\\ĺ·Ąĺ…·\\Hydrogen_Projet_Copilot\\README_v3.md" -Pattern "PROCEED WITH CAUTION|100 MW|EUR 150M|Score: 0.81" | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  Found: $\($_.Line.Trim\(\)\)" })
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(m12\): executive decision intelligence layer *)
